MORDREDSABER-SPOILS_OF_CAMELOT.descripti: #If you have at least !NpCost! *NP Charge: spend it to gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.

MORDREDSABER-TRIBUTE_TO_THE_THRONE.descr: #If you have at least !StarCost! *Critical *Stars: spend them to gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.

MORDREDSABER-BATTLE_INSTINCT.description: #If you have at least !StarCost! *Critical *Stars: spend them to draw !C! cards.

MORDREDSABER-INSOLENT_STRIKE.title: Insolent Strike
MORDREDSABER-INSOLENT_STRIKE.description: #Deal !D! damage. If you consumed a Critical this turn: gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.

MORDREDSABER-DEFIANCE_OF_AUTHORITY.descr: #Deal !D! damage. Against Elites and Bosses: gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-LIGHTNING_SPLINTERS.title: Lightning Splinters
MORDREDSABER-LIGHTNING_SPLINTERS.descrip: #Deal !D! damage 3 times to random enemies. Gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.

MORDREDSABER-KNIGHTS_STEADFASTNESS.title: Knight's Steadfastness
MORDREDSABER-KNIGHTS_STEADFASTNESS.descr: #Gain !B! Block. If you are in *Masked Knight form: gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.

MORDREDSABER-MANA_BURST_A.title: Mana Burst A
MORDREDSABER-MANA_BURST_A.description: #Exhaust. This turn, your Attacks deal !Strength! more.

MORDREDSABER-CIGARETTE_LION_B_PLUS.title: Cigarette Lion B+
MORDREDSABER-CIGARETTE_LION_B_PLUS.descr: #When played, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars. Whenever you gain a Critical, draw 1 card.
MORDREDSABER-SECRET_OF_PEDIGREE_E_X.desc: #Exhaust. Remove all Debuffs from yourself. Gain !B! Block and !NpCharge! *NP Charge. If you are in *Masked Knight form: gain !MaskedNp! more *NP Charge.

MORDREDSABER-STORM_OF_STEEL.title: Storm of Steel
MORDREDSABER-DEFIANT_CUT.title: Defiant Cut
MORDREDSABER-DEFIANT_CUT.description: #Deal !D! damage. Against Elites and Bosses: gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.
MORDREDSABER-RECKLESS_CHARGE.title: Reckless Charge
MORDREDSABER-LIGHTNING_SPEED.title: Lightning Speed
MORDREDSABER-DENTED_HELM.title: Dented Helm
MORDREDSABER-ROAR_OF_REBELLION.title: Roar of Rebellion
MORDREDSABER-ROAR_OF_REBELLION.descripti: #Switch to your opposite form. Draw !C! card.
MORDREDSABER-LIGHTNING_VISIT.title: Lightning Visit
MORDREDSABER-LIGHTNING_VISIT.description: #Switch form. At the end of your turn, return to the previous form.+ When you return, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.+
MORDREDSABER-RUDE_KICK.title: Rude Kick
MORDREDSABER-RUDE_KICK.description: #Deal !D! damage. Apply !Vulnerable! *Vulnerable. If you have a Critical ready: apply 2 *Vulnerable instead.
MORDREDSABER-CHAINED_LIGHTNING.title: Chained Lightning
MORDREDSABER-CHAINED_LIGHTNING.descripti: #Deal !D! damage to ALL enemies. If you consumed a Critical this turn: deal !Bonus! more to all.
MORDREDSABER-DRAGONS_BLOOD.title: Dragon's Blood
MORDREDSABER-DRAGONS_BLOOD.description: #At the start of your turn, gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge and !Block! Block.
MORDREDSABER-ACCUMULATED_HATRED.title: Accumulated Hatred
MORDREDSABER-ACCUMULATED_HATRED.descript: #Whenever you lose HP, gain 10 *NP Charge (up to !MaxProcs! times per turn).
MORDREDSABER-BANNER_OF_REBELLION.title: Banner of Rebellion
MORDREDSABER-BANNER_OF_REBELLION.descrip: #Whenever you switch form, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars and !NpCharge! *NP Charge+ and draw !C! card+.
MORDREDSABER-DEMANDED_DUEL.title: Demanded Duel
MORDREDSABER-DEMANDED_DUEL.description: #Apply !Weak! *Weak and !Vulnerable! *Vulnerable to an enemy. Gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-FATHERS_SWORD.title: Father's Sword
MORDREDSABER-FATHERS_SWORD.description: #Deal !D! damage. If you have at least !Threshold! *NP Charge (without spending it): deal !Bonus! more.
MORDREDSABER-ROYAL_TANTRUM.title: Royal Tantrum
MORDREDSABER-TOURNAMENT_GUARD.title: Tournament Guard
MORDREDSABER-ILL_REPAID_LOYALTY.title: Ill-Repaid Loyalty
MORDREDSABER-HOMUNCULUS_ACCELERATION.des: #The first time you consume a Critical each turn, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.
MORDREDSABER-DOUBLE_REBELLION.title: Double Rebellion
MORDREDSABER-DOUBLE_REBELLION.descriptio: #Deal !D! damage. If you switched form this combat: gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars and !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-SCORN_FOR_THE_THRONE.title: Scorn for the Throne
MORDREDSABER-SCORN_FOR_THE_THRONE.descri: #Gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge. Against Elites and Bosses: gain !Authority! more.
MORDREDSABER-TREAT_ME_AS_A_KNIGHT.title: "Treat Me as a Knight"
MORDREDSABER-TREAT_ME_AS_A_KNIGHT.descri: #Draw !C! cards. If you are in *Masked Knight form: draw !MaskedDraw! more.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_BLOOD_ARTHUR_MANUAL: #If *Masked, first tear off your helm. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage !Hits! times to ALL enemies; against Elites and Bosses, !Authority! more per hit; plus 1 per hit for every 20 NP Charge above the minimum. Then gain !Refund! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-MANA_BURST_RED_LIGHTNING.de: #Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least !ChargeCost!. Deal !D! damage, plus !OverchargeDamage! for every 10 NP Charge above the minimum.
MORDREDSABER-BEHEADING_OF_THE_USURPER.de: #Deal !D! damage. Against Elites and Bosses: !Authority! more.
MORDREDSABER-HUNDRED_SHATTERED_SWORDS.de: #Playable only with !StarCost! or more *Critical *Stars: spend them. Deal !D! damage.
MORDREDSABER-AVALANCHE_OF_HATRED.title: Avalanche of Hatred
MORDREDSABER-AVALANCHE_OF_HATRED.descrip: #Deal !D! damage 4 times. If you consumed a Critical this turn: !CritBonus! more per hit.
MORDREDSABER-CAMLANN.title: Camlann
MORDREDSABER-CAMLANN.description: #Exhaust. Gain 1 Guts. When it triggers, gain 100 *NP Charge+ and 50 *Critical *Stars+.
MORDREDSABER-CRIMSON_LIGHTNING_CLIMAX_PO: #Exhaust. Enter *Crimson Lightning permanently: your Attacks deal 2 more, gain 5 *NP Charge each turn, retain up to 10 Block, no penalty.
MORDREDSABER-SECRET_REVEALED.title: Secret Revealed
MORDREDSABER-SECRET_REVEALED.description: #Whenever you take off your helm (enter *Rebellion): gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars and draw !C! card.
MORDREDSABER-CROWN_OF_LIGHTNING.title: Crown of Lightning
MORDREDSABER-CROWN_OF_LIGHTNING.descript: #At the start of your turn, gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars.
MORDREDSABER-AMBITION_FOR_THE_THRONE.des: #At the start of your turn, gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-THE_MOST_RADIANT_SWORD.desc: #Your Criticals deal !CritBonus! more, and you gain !NpCharge! extra *NP Charge whenever you consume a Critical.
MORDREDSABER-KAIRIS_COMMAND_SEAL.title: Kairi's Command Seal
MORDREDSABER-CLAIM_CALIBURN.title: Claim Caliburn
MORDREDSABER-CLAIM_CALIBURN.description: #Exhaust. Add !C! random Rare card from your pool to your hand, costing 0 this turn.
MORDREDSABER-FEAST_AFTER_BATTLE.title: Feast After Battle
MORDREDSABER-STORM_OF_CAMELOT.title: Storm of Camelot
MORDREDSABER-COUP_D_ETAT.title: Coup d'Etat
MORDREDSABER-SABERFACE.title: Saberface
MORDREDSABER-SABERFACE.description: #The first time an enemy hits you each turn: gain !Stars! *Critical *Stars+ and !NpCharge! *NP Charge+.
MORDREDSABER-DENIED_INHERITANCE.title: Denied Inheritance
MORDREDSABER-DOUBLE_EDGE_OF_HATRED.title: Double Edge of Hatred
MORDREDSABER-MEMORY_OF_TRIFAS.title: Memory of Trifas
MORDREDSABER-MEMORY_OF_TRIFAS.descriptio: #At the start of your turn, heal !Heal! HP and gain !NpCharge! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_BLOOD_ARTHUR_UNLEAS: #Retain. Exhaust. If *Masked, first tear off your helm. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least 100. Deal !D! damage !Hits! times to ALL enemies; against Elites and Bosses, !Authority! more per hit; plus 1 per hit for every 20 NP Charge above 100. Then gain !Refund! *NP Charge.
MORDREDSABER-CLARENT_BLOOD_ARTHUR_INTERL: #Retain. Exhaust. Consume ALL your *NP Charge, at least 100. Deal !D! damage !Hits! times to ALL enemies; against Elites and Bosses, !Authority! more per hit; plus 1 per hit for every 15 NP Charge above 100. Then gain !Refund! *NP Charge.
